value: semiosis session 8 (2026-06-24). HARD RULE enforced: 200-line single test surface. Consolidated 13 test_*.py into core/test_manifold_invariants.py (200 lines, 25 tests pass). Deleted stale root-level cone_engine.py/interfaces.py/settings.py/test_manifold_invariants.py. Added 4 new KB methods: agentic_reflect(query,llm_fn,max_rounds=3)->list[ReflectStep] (LLM-in-loop recursive search refinement), categorical_parent_score(query,k=5)->list[CategoricalParentHit] (summarize+embed parent nodes), activation_embed(text)->list[float] (NLA activation-prediction routing or encoder fallback), energy_gradient_search(query,max_steps=10)->dict (RLM energy minimum-descent through cone hierarchy). New dataclasses: ReflectStep, CategoricalParentHit, EnergyStep. Fixed core/serialization.py: centroid JSON-serialize as float not numpy float32. Commit e6778a8.
